title: EmDash plugin manifest
description: Hand-authored manifest for publishing a plugin to the EmDash plugin registry. Lives next to the plugin's `package.json` as `emdash-plugin.jsonc`.

__schema0.description: Path or URL to the JSON Schema describing this file. Editors use this for completion and validation.

__schema1.title: Slug
__schema1.description: URL-safe plugin identifier within the publisher's namespace. ASCII letter then letters/digits/hyphens/underscores, max 64 characters. Combined with the publisher DID, this is the registry's primary key.

__schema2.title: Version
__schema2.description: Plugin version. Semver 2.0 subset; build-metadata `+...` is disallowed (the atproto record-key alphabet has no `+`). Bumped on every release.

__schema3.title: License
__schema3.description: SPDX license expression (e.g. "MIT", "Apache-2.0", "MIT OR Apache-2.0"). Required on first publish; ignored on subsequent publishes (the existing profile wins).

__schema4.title: Publisher
__schema4.description: Atproto DID or handle of the publishing identity. Pinned on first publish to prevent accidental publishes from a different account. DIDs are recommended (durable); handles work but are mutable.

__schema5.title: Capabilities
__schema5.description: Trust contract: what runtime APIs the plugin is allowed to use. Changing this between releases requires a version bump because installed users have consented to the old contract.

__schema7.title: Allowed hosts
__schema7.description: Allow-list of outbound host patterns when `network:request` is declared. Subdomain wildcards use a leading `*.`. Required (non-empty) when `network:request` is declared without `network:request:unrestricted`.

__schema9.title: Storage
__schema9.description: Storage collections the plugin uses. Each collection is namespaced to this plugin at runtime.

__schema11.title: Storage collection
__schema11.description: Index configuration for a single storage collection. Indexes are either single field names or composite (array of field names).

__schema17.title: Author
__schema17.description: A single author entry. Mirrors the lexicon's author shape.

__schema19.description: Author's homepage or profile URL. Either this or `email` is recommended.

__schema20.description: Author's contact email. Either this or `url` is recommended.

__schema21.title: Authors (multiple)
__schema21.description: Multi-author form. Mutually exclusive with `author`. Use the singular `author` if there is only one.

__schema23.title: Security contact
__schema23.description: A single security contact. At least one of `url` or `email` must be present.

__schema24.description: Security disclosure URL (e.g. a security.txt or vulnerability-reporting page). Either this or `email` is required.

__schema25.description: Security contact email. Either this or `url` is required.

__schema26.title: Security contacts (multiple)
__schema26.description: Multi-contact form. Mutually exclusive with `security`. Use the singular `security` if there is only one.

__schema27.title: Display name
__schema27.description: Human-readable name shown in directory listings. Defaults to the plugin's `id` when omitted.

__schema28.title: Description
__schema28.description: Short description (<= 140 graphemes by FAIR convention). Aggregators may truncate longer values when displaying in compact lists.

__schema31.title: Source repository
__schema31.description: HTTPS URL of the plugin's source repository. Surfaced in registry listings.
